executives.name: Axel Harries
executives.background: Axel Harries has served as a member of our Board since February 2021. He currently serves as Executive Vice President, Product Management & Sales at Mercedes-Benz AG. He has held various leadership roles at Daimler AG since 1993.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President of Product Management and Sales

executives.name: Frank Lindenberg
executives.background: Mr. Lindenberg has served as a director since 2021. He previously served as CFO of Mercedes-Benz Cars and CFO of Daimler Trucks. He is a member of the board of directors of various private companies.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Finance & Controlling / CFO (Mercedes-Benz AG)
